content.en:
The battle for the quota of the Talent Ancestor Pool came to an end, and the Wheel Wind Dao Ancestor announced the top ten rewards.

And the top ten are the Reincarnation God General, Xiao Yue, Baohai God General, Ice Rain God General, Huangyu God General, Red Yin God General, Cold-Blooded God General, Cloud No God General, Luo Yu God General and Dao God General.

"The top ten in the battle of the Talent Ancestral Pool quota can get a place to enter the Talent Ancestral Pool, in addition, the first place can get three Dao Inheritance that fits themselves, a hundred True Ancestor Inheritance, ten top Chaos Alchemy Inheritance, 10 million Heavenly Dao Stones, and 10,000 years of Enlightenment God Heavenly Realm Monument!"

"The second place can get two Dao Technique Inheritances that fit you, fifty True Ancestor Inheritances, five top-notch Chaos Alchemy Inheritances, five million Heavenly Dao Stones, and five thousand years of Enlightenment God Heavenly Boundary Monument!"

......

One by one, the rewards were announced, causing countless true monarchs to be crazy envious.

Even Ye Tian was moved by these rewards, not to mention anything else, he was very interested in the Dao Technique Inheritance alone.

Moreover, the enlightenment time of the Divine Heaven Realm Monument was enough to make him excited.

The Divine Heaven Realm Monument is not an ordinary supreme treasure, but a supreme treasure that can make people constantly deduce, create, and comprehend the Great Dao, which is of great use to Dao ancestors.

However, the Divine Heaven Realm Monument was occupied by the four transcendent forces, although the other forces also wanted to occupy the Divine Heaven Realm Monument, but the four transcendent forces descended on several Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor incarnations, where did the Dao Ancestor incarnations of the other top great forces dare to make a move!

However, under the pressure of the major forces, the four transcendent forces had no choice but to open the Divine Heaven Realm Monument.

However, due to the special nature of the Divine Heaven Boundary Monument, only one person is allowed to participate in enlightenment at a time, and the power of the Divine Heaven Boundary Monument will gradually decrease with enlightenment, and it will take a long time to recover.

Therefore, the time to comprehend the Divine Heavenly Boundary Monument is very precious, and it is impossible for the four transcendent forces to reward it for too long, otherwise where will the powerhouses of the four transcendent forces still have time to comprehend the Divine Heavenly Realm Monument!

Soon, the top ten in the battle for the quota of the Talent Ancestral Pool were rewarded one after another, and the rewards of Dao Inheritance, True Ancestor Inheritance, Chaos Alchemy Inheritance, and Heavenly Dao Stone were distributed almost on the spot.

But it is a pity that these inheritances are only allowed to be passed on by themselves, and cannot be transmitted, and the value of these inheritances is greatly reduced compared to those that can be transmitted.

But if you think about it carefully, wouldn't it be too exaggerated if the God General's level competition could obtain Dao Inheritance, True Ancestor Inheritance, and Top Alchemy Inheritance that could be passed on to others!

After all, any reward is enough to increase the foundation and foundation of the top powers! It is impossible for the four transcendent forces to be willing to give up so many inheritances, and they may not even have so many inheritances that can be spread at will!

As for the enlightenment time of the Divine Heavenly Boundary Monument, the top ten gods will each get a token, and they can use this token to enter the enlightenment at any time, but as long as they go to the enlightenment separately, it will not affect the enlightenment.

The rewards for the top ten are very generous, and any True Monarch will be moved, even enough to make many True Ancestors envious and jealous, and for the Divine Generals, it is an astronomical wealth.

But everyone knows very well that the real big chance is still the talent ancestral pool, which is enough to change the fate of the sky!

If you put them in the realm, there would be no chance to enter the Ancestral Pool of Talents.

But now, they have been given the opportunity to enter the Genius Ancestral Pool, and in the case that the powerhouses of the domain realm cannot be born for the time being.

Once the powerhouses of the domain realm wake up from their slumber, I am afraid that even the four transcendent forces will lose their talent ancestral pool, and they will not even be able to maintain their own status.

In this era, strength is everything, and even in the near future, even the major forces will be reorganized, and I don't know how many top forces and how many Dao Ancestors will fall because of this.

"Let's go, go to the Talent Ancestral Pool!"

The ten gods will be led by a Dao Ancestor incarnation to the Talent Ancestral Pool, but the onlookers are not qualified to go, and even Ye Tian is not allowed to approach the Talent Ancestral Pool.

......

The remains of the battlefield, in the midst of an abyss with no bottom in sight.

An ancient pool grew in the void, surrounded by dense prohibitions and large arrays, but most of the prohibitions were broken, and there was a small void passage that led directly into the pool.

This is the Talent Ancestral Pool!

Due to the shattering of the domain realm, many ruins have been seriously affected, and the same is true of this Talent Ancestral Pool, otherwise, the Dao Ancestor incarnations will not be able to break the ban, and those divine generals will not be able to enter the Talent Ancestral Pool.

Wow!!!

The void cracked, and a Famous Dao Ancestor incarnation came here, and then ten divine generals also came here.

"This is the Ancestral Pool of Talent, and you follow this void passage into it. Remember, don't try to take any other route when you go, or you'll be banned and wiped out, and we won't be able to rescue you!"

Wheel Wind Dao Ancestor reminded.

"Yes!"

A famous god will answer in unison.

Immediately, the ten god generals walked into the Talent Ancestral Pool, selected an area in the huge Talent Ancestral Pool, immersed themselves in it, and began to bear the transformation of the Talent Ancestral Pool.

Bang!!!!

Ten tornadoes formed in the Ancestral Pool of Talents, and countless mystical energies transformed their physical bodies, beginning to create a Dao-level natal talent in the depths of their souls.

It's a furious makeover, but the boost is pretty good.

Not to mention the extremely mysterious Dao-level natal talent, the energy transformation of that talent ancestral pool alone was enough to raise the foundation of the ten divine generals to another level.

For example, once the transformation of these ten-star gods is completed, their own foundation is definitely not weaker than that of the detached people at the level of the ten-star gods.

The creatures of the universe can transcend, enough to rise to a small level on the basis of the ten-star god generals, but the creatures in the chaos do not have this treatment.

But now, after the transformation of the talent ancestral pool, this treatment has caught up.

As for Xiao Yue, her foundation has also improved, but if she is detached in the future, it is estimated that the foundation will not be improved too much, because her foundation has almost been raised to the limit.

But her real ascension is not the foundation, but the impact of reincarnation and recultivation and the hidden dangers in the underworld, which have been completely repaired under the transformation of the talent ancestral pool at this moment.

For example, after she came out of the talent ancestral pool, she no longer had to fear the reincarnation divine general, and the six reincarnation techniques of the reincarnation divine general would definitely not be able to affect her anymore.

Time passed day by day, and thousands of years passed in the blink of an eye.

this day.

The transformation of the ten divine generals has basically been completed, and the aura of each one has improved a lot.

"Dao-level natal talent, it's done!"

The ten gods sensed the changes in their souls and laughed wildly one by one.
